noveltyJustification: Seven findings are new implementation constraints or resolved contradictions; one consolidates the prior no-shim inference into an executable boundary.
focus: Dependency-ordered migration, exact shell-safe git mv plan, compatibility policy, verification ladder, and rollback.

ruledOut: Whole _db move that can carry ignored mutable artifacts
Old-path filesystem aliases or database fallback
sourcesQueried: Git tracked inventory and scoped status

summary: Decouple bundle, manifest, and database paths while defaults remain old; move code/tests next; move manifest-owned data and flip defaults last.
Use the committed 1,290-record retrieval manifest to construct one shell-free git argument vector; reject wildcard bundle moves.
All oracle importers are tests, so move the complete oracle subtree to tests/oracle and create no production oracle module.
Move style-library.mjs and operator.mjs one-for-one under lib while preserving exports and direct execution; add no wrappers.
Do not move or create SQLite publication state; change defaults and ignore rules only, leaving rebuild opt-in.

approach: Whole backend-directory moves and wildcard bundle moves
reason: Whole _db can carry ignored mutable artifacts, while root wildcards can capture backend/docs and are not tied to the authoritative inventory.
